note: Curated recurring highlights at real Rennes venues. Dates are relative to today. Each item links to an official source.

events.title: Parlement de Bretagne – Guided Tour
events.description: Magnificent 17th-century Breton parliament building on the main square.

events.title: Les Champs Libres – Museum Quarter
events.description: Museum of Brittany, science centre and city library under one roof.

events.title: Parc du Thabor – Rose Garden
events.description: Elegant public garden with aviary, bandstand and 3,000 rose varieties.

events.title: Marché des Lices – Saturday Market
events.description: One of France's largest food markets every Saturday morning.

events.title: Opéra de Rennes – Season Programme
events.description: Opera, dance and concerts in a renovated 19th-century theatre.

events.title: Rue Saint-Michel – Pub Crawl
events.description: Famous 'Rue de la Soif' lined with student bars and live music.

events.title: Coulée Verte – Urban Greenway
events.description: Pedestrian and cycle path along a former railway through the city.

events.title: Espace des Sciences – Planetarium
events.description: Hands-on science exhibits and planetarium shows.

events.title: Transmusicales – Music Festival
events.description: Cutting-edge international music festival each December.
